linkedin_profile.headline: Director at Darkhorse Restaurant & Cocktail Bar

experience.title: Chef De Partie
experience.organization: Le Pont De la Tour Restaurant

experience.title: Head Chef
experience.description: Full responsibility of three production kitchens: Responsible for the re-design of a large extension to Soho House kitchens & restaurant resulting in a 40% increase in revenue & increase brigade from 12 to 18 chefs Compiled seven regularly changing menus ranging from A La Carte to Canapés & Finger Food Total responsibility for all kitchen budgets and day-to-day wage and food costs Responsible for the organisation, setting up and running of Cannes Film Festival for five years from 98-03, this included its 65-seater restaurant and bar on a luxury boat in Cannes harbour for a two-week period

experience.title: Executive Head Chef
experience.description: Soho House members club with 24 boutique hotel rooms, 24 hour room service, 120-seater fine dining restaurant, large bar and lounge area with eating and drinking facilities for up to 250 people, roof terrace restaurant bar and swimming pool, screening room and two private function rooms for canapés, finger food and sit down dinners for up to 150. Brought in at a very early stage of the project to help look at potential sites, set yearly budgets and look at the general design of the project, ranging from restaurant & kitchen design to facilities for over a 150 staff. Relocated to New York in December 02 to help supervise the fitting, hiring of staff, attain suppliers and to draw up a schedule to help the day-to-day running of the project, which opened in June 03. The next 14 months was spent building a strong clientele base from 700 to 3,000 members in a very competitive market place. A full strength team was established as well as a very good food and wage cost and strong clientele base secured by the time I left to return to the UK August 04.

experience.title: Restaurant Chef Hospitality Consultant
experience.description: Working with all types of hoteliers and restaurateurs. Project manage start ups to refurbishment projects helping to achieve initial goals, direction and build a team. Advice and hands-on training with restaurant and kitchen staff or advice on budgeting and purchasing Other areas of assistance, Branding, Design, Development, Financial services and Business plans. I have interests in a number of different projects and invite any opportunities.

experience.title: Director
experience.description: 35 cover restaurant bar/delicatessen offering Spanish/Italian tapas with annual turnover circa £450k Acquisition of premises in July 2006 followed by 3 month fit-out from an empty shell. Business has delivered profit each year for the last 5 years. This has been achieved through: Maintaining both quality & price to consumers Cost management with business currently achieving payroll of 31% and Food & Beverage cost of sale of 28% Recruitment & empowerment of strong management team

experience.title: Director
experience.location: East Village, Olympic Park London E20
experience.description: A modern European Restaurant / Bar with influences from Italy and Spain wrapped up with British attitude. Bringing to the table a restaurant & bar to enrich London’s newest neighbourhood and preserve the legacy of the 2012 Olympic Games. Extensive bar with signature cocktails, local beers and well sourced wines with provenance. A great place to dine, drink and entertain with friends, family or work colleagues.
